title: satureja alpina var. elatior
intro: Satureja alpina var. elatior, also known as mountain savory or Alpine savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja alpina var. elatior include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that help combat infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb to utilize its medicinal properties, with some herbalists recommending it for its potential to help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues.
